Approach:
To ensure a seamless transition from Spring Kafka to Events-Client without downtime or scheduled maintenance, a temporary queue has been introduced. This queue will be consumed asynchronously using Spring Kafka, and events will be republished to the new topics via the Events-Library. This approach guarantees a lossless migration of events while maintaining system reliability.

fn-connect
fn-notification-publisher
fn-notification-dispatcher
